data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'next-eligible-delivery timestamp to enforce cool-down', which is a critical component of the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to this timestamp, indicating a clear gap in the functionality. The absence of this specific validation means the requirement is not covered, leading to a failed assessment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
